name: Starship
first: First fully reusable orbital Start system, designed for Mars settlement
description: Two-stage stainless-steel vehicle with a Super Heavy booster (33 Raptor engines) and a Starship upper stage (6 Raptors). Architected around orbital propellant transfer: a tanker variant refills Starship in LEO, enabling ~100 t nach Mars Oberfläche — orders of magnitude more than any prior launcher. Orbital Flug programme began 2023.
